---
title: "ab-annotate demo"
bibliography: refs.bib
nocite: |
  @*
citeproc: false
filters:
  - ab-annotate
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
ab-annotate:
  show-abstract: true
  show-annotation: true
  show-labels: true
---

This document demonstrates `ab-annotate` as a Quarto extension.
Every entry in `refs.bib` will be listed below (via `nocite: "@*"`),
with its abstract and annotation attached to each reference.

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
